name: minorcell-theme
description: A minimal, customizable VS Code theme that follows the operating system appearance.

minorcellTheme.followSystem.description: Automatically use Minorcell Light or Minorcell Dark when the operating system appearance changes.

minorcellTheme.appearance.borders.description: Show borders and focus outlines in both Minorcell themes. Turning this off reduces keyboard focus visibility.

minorcellTheme.appearance.shadows.description: Show widget and scrollbar shadows in both Minorcell themes.

minorcellTheme.dark.background.patternErrorMessage: Use a hexadecimal color such as #61afef or #61afef80.
minorcellTheme.dark.background.description: Dark theme editor and terminal background.

minorcellTheme.dark.surface.patternErrorMessage: Use a hexadecimal color such as #61afef or #61afef80.
minorcellTheme.dark.surface.description: Dark theme side bar, title bar, inputs, and widget surface.

minorcellTheme.dark.foreground.patternErrorMessage: Use a hexadecimal color such as #61afef or #61afef80.

minorcellTheme.dark.muted.patternErrorMessage: Use a hexadecimal color such as #61afef or #61afef80.
minorcellTheme.dark.muted.description: Dark theme secondary text and inactive controls.

minorcellTheme.dark.accent.patternErrorMessage: Use a hexadecimal color such as #61afef or #61afef80.
minorcellTheme.dark.accent.description: Dark theme focus, link, badge, and progress accent.

minorcellTheme.dark.comment.patternErrorMessage: Use a hexadecimal color such as #61afef or #61afef80.

minorcellTheme.dark.keyword.patternErrorMessage: Use a hexadecimal color such as #61afef or #61afef80.

minorcellTheme.dark.string.patternErrorMessage: Use a hexadecimal color such as #61afef or #61afef80.

minorcellTheme.dark.number.patternErrorMessage: Use a hexadecimal color such as #61afef or #61afef80.

minorcellTheme.dark.function.patternErrorMessage: Use a hexadecimal color such as #61afef or #61afef80.

minorcellTheme.dark.type.patternErrorMessage: Use a hexadecimal color such as #61afef or #61afef80.
minorcellTheme.dark.type.description: Dark theme classes, types, and enums.

minorcellTheme.light.background.patternErrorMessage: Use a hexadecimal color such as #61afef or #61afef80.
minorcellTheme.light.background.description: Light theme editor and terminal background.

minorcellTheme.light.surface.patternErrorMessage: Use a hexadecimal color such as #61afef or #61afef80.
minorcellTheme.light.surface.description: Light theme side bar, title bar, inputs, and widget surface.

minorcellTheme.light.foreground.patternErrorMessage: Use a hexadecimal color such as #61afef or #61afef80.

minorcellTheme.light.muted.patternErrorMessage: Use a hexadecimal color such as #61afef or #61afef80.
minorcellTheme.light.muted.description: Light theme secondary text and inactive controls.

minorcellTheme.light.accent.patternErrorMessage: Use a hexadecimal color such as #61afef or #61afef80.
minorcellTheme.light.accent.description: Light theme focus, link, badge, and progress accent.

minorcellTheme.light.comment.patternErrorMessage: Use a hexadecimal color such as #61afef or #61afef80.

minorcellTheme.light.keyword.patternErrorMessage: Use a hexadecimal color such as #61afef or #61afef80.

minorcellTheme.light.string.patternErrorMessage: Use a hexadecimal color such as #61afef or #61afef80.

minorcellTheme.light.number.patternErrorMessage: Use a hexadecimal color such as #61afef or #61afef80.

minorcellTheme.light.function.patternErrorMessage: Use a hexadecimal color such as #61afef or #61afef80.

minorcellTheme.light.type.patternErrorMessage: Use a hexadecimal color such as #61afef or #61afef80.
minorcellTheme.light.type.description: Light theme classes, types, and enums.
